privacy.attribution: display names with compact per-person aggregate counts

lexicon.reference: Norvig count_1w / Google Web Trillion Word Corpus

phrases.measure: observed frequency + voice breadth + normalized PMI

semantic_graph.edge_method: normalized association from composition or repeated observation within an eight-token message neighborhood
semantic_graph.edge_series_unit: co-occurring message documents per 1k daily messages

method.tokenization: lowercase word surfaces; phrases cannot cross punctuation, URLs, Discord markup, or newlines
method.lexicon: three-times-broad-web eligibility gate; ranked by observed adoption times logarithmic distinctiveness capped at 100x; broad-web comparison shown as expected uses in an equal-size sample
method.phrases: literal adjacent bigrams/trigrams; frequency, voice breadth, normalized PMI, and whole-bigram reference lift
method.movement: plain normalized percentage change across recent 13 weeks versus the preceding 13; smoothed log-ratio used only for ranking
method.topic_method: phrase-aware atomic replay; aboutness-gated words and qualified bigrams in one composition/context graph; weighted modularity
method.circles: weighted participant overlap across origin channels
method.topic_series_unit: member-filtered non-overlapping semantic-unit mentions per 10k words
